message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame min + max (4 cases)

Append 4 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame-level extrema
reductions:

- min_basic: each column's min picked correctly (min appears in
  different row per column to verify per-column reduction)
- min_with_nulls_skipna: nulls in different rows per column
- max_basic: same setup, dual-direction
- max_with_nulls_skipna

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.min(axis=0)/.max(axis=0) and emits expected_series), runs the
Rust DataFrame.min_agg()/.max_agg(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. DataFrameMin and DataFrameMax were already
wired through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-vz49p]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
